---
name: Install support
about: Ask for help installing the portal for one owner or agency
title: "[Install] "
labels: install-support, template
---

## Install Target

- Owner or agency:
- Country / market:
- Deployment target: Vercel / other
- Runtime storage: demo-memory / Postgres

## Current State

- [ ] Forked the repo
- [ ] Ran `npm install`
- [ ] Ran `npm run validate`
- [ ] Ran `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] Ran `npm run build`
- [ ] Applied `db/schema.sql`
- [ ] Applied `db/rls.sql`
- [ ] Seeded `db/seed-sample.sql` or private owner seed
- [ ] Checked `/admin/runtime`

## Question

Describe what is blocked. Do not include real renter names, access codes, private addresses, IDs, payment details, or full lease terms.
